title: Merger or consolidation of corporation and limited liability company, partnership, or limited partnership
doc_html:
§117.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

Acts 1992, No. 780, §2, eff. July 7, 1992; Acts 1995, No. 847, §3, eff. June 27, 1995; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
